title: PageTemplate
description: Declarative manifest exported alongside a page template's element class. Identifies the template, declares its regions (named drop zones), and the placement rules for each. See specs/crosscut/page-templates.md.

templateId.description: Globally unique template identifier, kebab-case, dot-separated (e.g. 'template.one-column').

displayName.description: Human-readable label used in the template picker.

description.description: Optional longer description shown in the template picker.

preview.description: Optional URL to a preview thumbnail shown in the template picker.

regions.description: Ordered list of region declarations. At least one region is required (INV-TEMPLATE-01).

name.description: Region name (kebab-case). Matches the slot name a widget manifest declares in its 'slots'.

required.description: If true, the page document MUST place at least one widget in this region (INV-TEMPLATE-05).

maxWidgets.description: Optional upper bound on how many widgets may be placed. null or absent = unbounded (INV-TEMPLATE-04).

$comment: Enforces INV-TEMPLATE-01 (required manifest fields) and INV-TEMPLATE-04 (maxWidgets bounds). See specs/crosscut/page-templates.md.
